name: tr
description: Translate, squeeze, or delete characters from text. Reads from standard input and replaces each character in set1 with the corresponding character in set2. Use -d to delete characters in set1, -s to squeeze repeated characters, -c to complement set1. Supports character classes like [:upper:], [:lower:], [:digit:], [:space:]. Use for case conversion, removing unwanted characters, collapsing whitespace, or transliterating text.

input.description: Text to translate, provided on standard input. The first argument is the source character set (set1) and optional second argument is the replacement set (set2).

output.description: Text with characters translated, deleted, or squeezed as specified.
